name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Mock System Directory (Image)
notes: This Building Block triggers when a high integrity process loads images from a System32 directory that is not C:\Windows\System32.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Image Loaded from Mock System Directory
BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Mock System Directory (Image) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Image Loaded from Mock System Directory, BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 2 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 2 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Mock System Directory (Image) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Image Loaded from Mock System Directory, BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Process ID (custom), Machine Identifier (custom) and different Low Level Category in 2 minutes
